title: coleus monostachyus subsp. monostachyus
intro: Coleus monostachyus subsp. monostachyus, also known as the Java Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its leaves and roots are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Coleus monostachyus subsp. monostachyus are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
